CustomField.formula: IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 1 - DON'T KNOW"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QC4a", "CCM 1 - DON'T KNOW",40,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 2 - CONTACT INFO"), IMAGE ("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QC59", "CCM 2 - CONTACT INFO",40,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 3 - TIME & EFFORT"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QC62", "CCM 3 - TIME & EFFORT",45,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 4 - FIRST TRANS"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QC6H", "CCM 4 - FIRST TRANS",45,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 5 - REPEAT TRANS"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QC6R", "CCM 5 - REPEAT TRANS",45,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 6 - CROSSOVER"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QCCA", "CCM 6 - CROSSOVER",45,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 7 - REPEAT CROSSOVER"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QCEL", "CCM 7 - REPEAT CROSSOVER",45,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 8 - ALL THREE TYPES"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QCEV", "CCM 8 - ALL THREE TYPES",45,125), IF(ISPICKVAL(CCM_Completed__c, "CCM 9 - PROCLAIM"), IMAGE("/servlet/servlet.FileDownload?file=015i0000005QCEf", "CCM 9 - PROCLAIM",45,125),null)))))))))
CustomField.label: CCM Stage
